channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish dumped on pavement, 25th April
item.description:
Looks like some sort of tarp dumped on the path.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Milborough Crescent, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left on street, 25th April
item.description:
Continuous fly tipping spot- rubbish over pavement including nappies

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Yorkland Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple large potholes, 25th April
item.description:
Potholes so large the bus violently shakes whilst passengers are on it. Road surface needs repair as it has multiple potholes
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17 - 29, Hawley Crescent, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 99 Brondesbury villas, 25th April
item.description:
Pavement and road needs seeping as rubbish is everywhere. If the litter goes into the drains it will block them and cause the road to flood when it rains

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti needs removing from utility box please, 25th April
item.description:
.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Footpath From Outside 497-551 Middle Park Avenue Through Parking Area, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Priory Tavern, 250 Belsize Road, NW64BT, 25th April
item.description:
Beacon bulb has stopped flashing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Belsize Road, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trolleys abandoned in green space here, 25th April
item.description:
.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Middle Park Avenue, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner of Douglas and priory park roads, 25th April
item.description:
Recycling bins from 103 were filled with normal rubbish and haven't been collected for several weeks. I don't think the tenants are able/willing to resort as the bins are now overflowing and starting to smell. Could they please be collected as normal rubbish? There are currently 4 full bins at the property with two on the sidewalk. Thank you
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Loose step, top step on stairs on The Link side of Abridge, 25th April
item.description:
The top right step/paving slap on the steps by The Link to the bridge over the road is loose and woobley, feels like it might might come away if someone steps heavy on the lip edge

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Ridgeway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left in container overloaded, wind blowing the rubbish all over the street. Container belongs to Sainsbury's., 25th April
item.description:
Rubbish left in container overloaded, wind blowing the rubbish all over the street. Container belongs to Sainsbury's.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lambarde Square, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin bags scattered on the pavement, 25th April
item.description:
Looks like the bags have been ripped open by vermin causing litter to scatter everywhere

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Enfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish all over roads, 25th April
item.description:
Bin collection missed and rubbish all over roads

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Median Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox with guts squashed all over carriageway, 25th April
item.description:
Killed this morning
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 109, Marlow Road, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: Abandon car, 25th April
item.description:
Car has been in car park since December and will require removal

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Welling High Street, Welling, Greater London

item.title: Next to red post box and bus stop, 25th April
item.description:
Very large, broken tree branches almost falling off.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mornington Terrace, Chalk Farm, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish dumped outside 59 Charlton church lane, 25th April
item.description:
Increasing amounts of rubbish, including paint pots, being dumped daily.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Church Lane, Charlton

item.title: Mattresss and sofas fly tipped, 25th April
item.description:
Mattresss and sofas fly tipped Need to be picked up

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Canterbury Road, London

item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Overgrown birch tree, 25th April
item.description:
BT engineers cannot complete installation of full fibre network as the branches are preventing this.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 55, Ridgeway Avenue, East Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 25th April
item.description:
I live at 47 Fields Estate. Rubbish was moved from the permanent fly tipping at at the base of the tower at London Fields to outside our property. I have now moved it back. This area in CONSTANTLY full of rubbish and whatever we do it is always there.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Albion Drive, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip trash, 25th April
item.description:
Bins filled with refuse that the collection people will not empty because the bin is ‘contaminated’ with the ‘wrong kind’ it trash. There is nothing that residents can do to stop this as the bins are on the street. I reported this yesterday and received a notification saying it has been resolved. Obviously not.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farmers Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
